memory_entries.text: SQLite product DB: group g1 is the office products dataset (items_g1/fdbk_g1/attrs_g1/taxn_g1); items_g1 main_cat='Office Products' has 13933 items. Archived from sale corresponds to attrs_g1 attr_key='Is Discontinued By Manufacturer' attr_val='Yes' (values include No/Yes/False/false). fdbk_g1.vrf is integer verified-purchase flag. Query pattern: use a CTE/list of archived ref_ids and filter fdbk_g1 with IN to avoid timeout on joins.
